arts.ttl: Confirmed: Preston, Leeds have Greenwood fee already agreed
arts.sum: Leeds United attacking midfielder Sam Greenwood is enjoying his time at Preston this season, and director Peter Ridsdale has given a key update on the possibility of a permanent deal. Peter Ridsdale: Leeds and Preston have already agreed fee for Sam Greenwood

arts.ttl: 'Irrelevant' - Peter Ridsdale backtracks over Leeds United transfer comments - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Preston North End director Peter Ridsdale is adamant Leeds United's promotion push will have no bearing on the situation surrounding Sam Greenwood’s future. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Warnock: Leeds’ Dan James is my favourite Ch’ship player
arts.sum: Leeds United winger Dan James is flying at the moment with goals and assists in the Championship, and Neil Warnock is full of praise. Dan James is one of those nailed-on starters right now, fresh from putting the sword to Cardiff City with a goal and two assists, moments that will be extra sweet for a former Swansea City man.

arts.ttl: How the final Championship table is expected to finish as Leeds United crowned and Cardiff City and Swansea City safe
arts.sum: The transfer window is closed and now it's clearer to see where both Welsh clubs will finish

arts.ttl: Leeds United tipped to plan big-money transfer deal for No10 upon promotion
arts.sum: Leeds United were linked late in the January window with a move to sign Krasnodar attacking midfielder Eduard Spertsyan, and he has now been tipped to move in the summer. A more left-field link emerged late in the January window with Leeds said to be taking an interest in signing Russian Premier League star Eduard Spertsyan.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI v Coventry City
arts.sum: Leeds United travel to the CBS Arena tonight to take on Frank Lampard’s in-form Coventry City, looking to maintain their unbeaten run and standing at the top of the Championship. Coventry City v Leeds United predictions?

arts.ttl: Leeds United told they missed a trick in not signing Edwards
arts.sum: Leeds United should have tried to sign forward Marcus Edwards in the winter transfer window, according to Whites old boy Ross McCormack. If we’re really honest, does a player who doesn’t make it into the top 17-18 players in a bottom half Premier League squad, does he really improve Leeds United?

arts.ttl: Leeds United in FC25: Past Legends and Present Players
arts.sum: The ranking of the top 15 EFL Championship players includes 5 Leeds United stars, which is more than any other team can boast. To say more, many stars from the Leeds roster are so far listed among the best EFL Championship players, enhancing Leeds’ esports odds of winning as soon as they get out on the field.

arts.ttl: £7.5m wanted for Leeds United loan favourite amid potential summer transfer
arts.sum: Leeds United loan man Joe Rothwell could cost around £7.5m for a permanent deal in the summer, according… The post £7.5m wanted for Leeds United loan favourite amid potential summer transfer appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's next five Championship fixtures compared to Burnley and promotion rivals
arts.sum: Leeds United return to Championship action tonight when they take on Coventry City (7.45pm). Leeds United's next five Championship fixtures
